mapper.sql: fridge_item_id AS fridgeItemId, name, qty, unit, storage_type AS storageType, expiry_date AS expiryDate, DATEDIFF(expiry_date, CURDATE()) AS dDay, memo
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(storage_type = 'FRIDGE'), 0) AS fridgeCount, COALESCE(SUM(storage_type = 'FREEZER'), 0) AS freezerCount, COALESCE(SUM(storage_type = 'ROOM_TEMP'), 0) AS roomTempCount FROM fridge_item WHERE member_id = #{memberId}
SELECT FROM fridge_item WHERE fridge_item_id = #{fridgeItemId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO fridge_item (member_id, name, qty, unit, storage_type, expiry_date, memo) VALUES (#{cmd.memberId}, #{cmd.name}, #{cmd.qty}, #{cmd.unit}, #{cmd.storageType}, #{cmd.expiryDate}, #{cmd.memo})
mapper.update: UPDATE fridge_item SET name = #{cmd.name}, qty = #{cmd.qty}, unit = #{cmd.unit}, storage_type = #{cmd.storageType}, expiry_date = #{cmd.expiryDate}, memo = #{cmd.memo} WHERE fridge_item_id = #{fridgeItemId}
